overview: Stallo.in is a premium enterprise-grade wedding food stall booking marketplace for Nawada, Bihar. It connects customers with verified stall vendors (chaat, golgappa, dosa, ice cream, mocktails, and more) through a trusted platform with transparent pricing, smooth 5-step booking, and real order tracking across three role-based dashboards.
features: Premium landing page with hero, categories, featured vendors, how-it-works, and testimonials
Browse stalls with search, category/price/location filters, and verified vendor badges
5-step booking flow: package selection, date/venue, guests, price review, Stripe payment
Admin dashboard with KPI cards, vendor approval queue, analytics charts, and commission settings
Vendor dashboard with order management, package CRUD, earnings summary, and image uploads
Customer dashboard with bookings, reviews, saved vendors, and booking receipts
Vendor self-registration with admin approval workflow and email notifications
Tiered cancellation policy logic with fee calculation and refund processing
Role-based access control via authorization extension with Internet Identity login
Email notifications for all key events: booking, payment, approvals, cancellations
